notes: Evidence artifact (iteration 1) in KB claims verification_complete status. However, adversarial review reveals that 4 of 7 ACs (AC-3, AC-4, AC-5, AC-7) lack corresponding evidence items in EVIDENCE.yaml. AC-6 (grep verification) is the primary evidence, confirming zero forbidden patterns. AC-1 and AC-2 have file path evidence. AC-7 (smoke test) has zero evidence. Overall verdict is CHALLENGE because 3 ACs are REJECT (lack evidence) and 1 AC is CHALLENGE (missing proof). Verification leader's independent grep validation is noted in VERIFICATION artifact but does not extend to AC-3, AC-4, or AC-5 coverage gaps.
